name: Aetheris - Ilhas Flutuantes
description:
Welcome to Aetheris! In here, a steampunk fantasy world where the arid land below is interrupted only by floating islands in the skies, the landscape is shaped by the elemental flow of magic. Embark on a unique journey through Aetheris’s vibrant skies and airborne cities, where airships traverse challenging routes and suspended ports reveal diverse cultures and peoples. Stand alongside daring merchants who cut through the ether winds, uncover isolated realms full of ancient secrets, and explore hidden lairs where pirates and fantastical creatures rule.

Aetheris is a realm where the horizon brims with mysteries, and magic, though rare, subtly flows through the elements permeating every corner of this world. On each island and in every steam-powered marketplace, pulsating tales and fragile alliances lie in wait, ready to be unveiled.

This bot is designed for long-form interactions, so feel free to save details about your character in the chat memory, as well as any other information you find relevant. This will help the bot enhance your story experience.

The bot adapts to various narrative styles, depending on the needs of the game, so feel free to edit both your messages and the bot’s responses, or regenerate responses as desired.

The bot was created and adapted from Kolach's command prompt base.
creator: XBobJanitor
